title: Martech Product Manager - Fintech/B2B SaaS
description:
• Early member of a fast-growing company to help them build their Martech product!
  • Own the strategy for their customer data platform from end-to-end!

About Our Client

Our client is a well-established organisation operating within the Fintech/Payments industry. They are focused on driving innovation and leveraging digital platforms to deliver exceptional services to their customers.

Job Description

· Develop and implement product strategies for marketing technology solutions.

· Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify business needs and translate them into product requirements.

· Oversee the entire product lifecycle, from concept to launch and ongoing performance optimisation.

· Analyse market trends and competitor offerings to identify new opportunities for product development.

· Work closely with stakeholders to ensure alignment with organisational goals and strategies.

· Monitor product performance and implement improvements based on user feedback and analytics.

· Ensure compliance with industry regulations and best practices in the technology and telecoms sector.

· Provide regular updates and reports on project progress to senior management.

The Successful Applicant

A successful Martech Product Manager should have:

  • A strong background in product management, particularly in working with customer data platforms.
  • Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to manage multiple projects effectively.
  • Experience working with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality products.
  • A solid understanding of market trends and customer needs within the digital landscape.



What's on Offer

· Competitive annual salary.

· Comprehensive benefits package, including ESOP and variable bonus of 1-2 months.

· Permanent position with opportunities for growth and development.

· Work within a forward-thinking organisation in the technology and telecoms industry.If you are a motivated Martech Product Manager seeking an exciting opportunity, we encourage you to apply today.

Contact
